feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: The 3x Leverage That Built a 192% Year Just Took Back 18% in Hours
entry.content: The 3x Leverage That Built a 192% Year Just Took Back 18% in Hours

entry.title: Uber, Wayve and Waymo are headed towards a robotaxi showdown in London
entry.content: Uber customers in the UK can now join an interest list to increase their chances of being matched with a Wayve robotaxi.

entry.title: Dave Ramsey says this group of Americans could lose out from Roth conversions. Are you one of them?
entry.content: Dave Ramsey says this group of Americans could lose out from Roth conversions. Are you one of them?

entry.title: Apple (AAPL) Is A Top Stock In Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
entry.content: Apple (AAPL) Is A Top Stock In Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio

entry.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) Is A Top AI Stock In Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio
entry.content: NVIDIA (NVDA) Is A Top AI Stock In Billionaire Ken Fisher’s Portfolio

entry.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Advances Zeus Gas Plant and Third Coastal Bend Fractionator to Expand Integrated Midstream Capacity
entry.content: Phillips 66 (PSX) Advances Zeus Gas Plant and Third Coastal Bend Fractionator to Expand Integrated Midstream Capacity

entry.title: Biomarin Pharmaceutical (BMRN): Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy and Hold for 2 Years
entry.content: Biomarin Pharmaceutical (BMRN): Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy and Hold for 2 Years

entry.title: Trump and Netanyahu’s Rift Over Lebanon Is Deepening
entry.content: The exchange of fire between the two countries has brought new urgency to a simmering disagreement.

entry.title: What Xi and Kim Want From Their Summit in North Korea
entry.content: The Chinese leader arrived in Pyongyang for a two-day summit with Kim Jong Un, seeking to strengthen their alliance against the West.

entry.title: Powerful Earthquake Kills at Least 19 in Southern Philippines
entry.content: The 7.8-magnitude quake struck off the coast of the island of Mindanao as tremors collapsed buildings and ripped through roads across the archipelago.

entry.title: Oil Climbs as Israel-Iran Clashes Stoke Middle East Escalation Fears
entry.content: Oil prices surged after Israel and Iran exchanged fire, threatening an already fragile ceasefire in the Middle East and dimming hopes for an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

entry.title: What to Stream: 'Michael,' Olivia Rodrigo and Keith Urban albums and Bonnaroo
entry.content: The streaming service debut of “Michael” and new albums from Olivia Rodrigo and Keith Urban are among the entertainment highlights this week hitting streaming services

entry.title: A 7.8 magnitude earthquake in the southern Philippines causes 4 deaths, damage and a tsunami
entry.content: A magnitude 7.8 earthquake has caused destruction in the southern Philippines and set off a 3-foot tsunami

entry.title: The World’s Most Surprising Economic Success Story Is…North Korea
entry.content: Arms sales to Russia and goods from China provide a boost, despite sanctions. “The regime is wealthier than ever.”

entry.title: Tony Awards 2026: "Schmigadoon!" wins best musical in a season saved by revivals
entry.content: 'Cats: The Jellicle Ball' and Ragtime' were the standout musical winners at the Tony Awards; "Schmigadoon!" took the prize for best new musical.

entry.title: 6/7/2026: Under Siege; Turning the Ship Around; The Dog Aging Project
entry.content: First, a look at threats against U.S. judges under Trump. Then, collapse of U.S. shipbuilding poses national and economic security risks. And, a dog study may help pets and humans age well.

entry.title: Tony Awards winners list for 2026: Live updates
entry.content: The 2026 Tony Awards are underway, honoring the best of Broadway's plays and musicals.

entry.title: Tony Awards 2026: 'Death of Salesman,' the prestige hit of the Broadway season, is showered with Tony love
entry.content: The critically hailed revival of 'Death of a Salesman' wins TK Tony Awards, including best revival and best featured actress in a play for Laurie Metcalf.

entry.title: 6/7: CBS Weekend News
entry.content: Iran strikes Israel for first time since April ceasefire in retaliation for Israeli attack on Beirut; 12 hurt in "gunfight" at Ohio festival, police say.

entry.title: Tony Awards 2026: An upset win delivers the night's most political speech (with vampires as a metaphor)
entry.content: Ali Louis Bourzgui scored an upset win for performance by an actor in a featured role and went on to make a passionate speech in support of Palestine and immigrants — using vampires as a metaphor.

entry.title: The last jeepney in San Francisco
entry.content: It's part military jeep, part rolling art museum, and for Filipino Americans, it's a symbol of cultural identity and resilience. Itay Hod takes a ride on San Francisco's last jeepney.

entry.title: Local seafood takes center stage at San Diego farmer's market for fish
entry.content: To cultivate a taste for what's local, San Diego fishermen now sell directly to customers every Saturday at the Tuna Harbor Dockside Market. It's like a farmer's market, but for fish. David Schecter reports.

entry.title: Pope Leo works to broaden appeal of Catholic Church with event in Spain
entry.content: Pope Leo held an arena event geared towards celebrities and influencers Sunday in Madrid. Chris Livesay reports.

entry.title: 7.8 magnitude earthquake shakes southern Philippines, triggers tsunami watch
entry.content: Tsunami waves were possible in the Philippines, with smaller waves possible in Taiwan, Japan, Guam, Papua New Guinea and several island nations and territories.

entry.title: LA stadium workers vote to strike with World Cup kicking off this week
entry.content: Hospitality workers at Los Angeles' Sofi Stadium voted Friday to authorize a strike, demanding better pay, job protections from AI and assurances that immigration enforcement won't happen there. The move comes just days from the first matches of the FIFA World Cup.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
The usefulness of a cup is in its emptiness.
Lucky Numbers: 76, 52, 51, 3, 8, 95

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Take the last sliver of a soap bar and stick in the new bar.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: In every episode of Seinfeld there is a Superman somewhere.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Thomas Jefferson
entry.content: “I like the dreams of the future better than the history of the past.” — Thomas Jefferson

entry.title: China's Xi says he will work with North Korea to fight hegemony, North Korean media says
entry.content: China's Xi says he will work with North Korea to fight hegemony, North Korean media says

entry.title: Armenia's ruling party leads parliamentary vote with 54% in early results
entry.content: Armenia's ruling party leads parliamentary vote with 54% in early results

entry.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
entry.content: President Donald Trump did not rule out the government paying people who were charged with assaulting police officers during the Jan. 6 attack on the U.S.

entry.title: Iran admits extraordinary new detail in Khamenei strike, Trump offered 'way out': expert
entry.content: Iran admits extraordinary new detail in Khamenei strike, Trump offered 'way out': expert

entry.title: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says Russian magnate Abramovich came to Kyiv with offer of help
entry.content: Ukraine's Zelenskiy says Russian magnate Abramovich came to Kyiv with offer of help

entry.title: Tribeca Festival condemns Actor Elon Gold and influencer Lizzy Savetsky's 'offensive' dog rape joke
entry.content: Actor Elon Gold and pro-Israel influencer Lizzy Savetsky face backlash and Tribeca Festival condemnation over a Palestine joke.

entry.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
entry.content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

entry.title: Iran Fires Waves of Missiles at Israel After Israeli Airstrike on Beirut
entry.content: Tehran has sought a halt to Israeli operations inside Lebanon as part of its peace negotiations with Washington.

entry.title: Knicks watch party outside MSG canceled due to Trump’s planned attendance
entry.content: New York Knicks fans can cheer on their beloved team pretty much anywhere in the city’s five boroughs on Monday night — except outside of Madison Square Garden

entry.title: Barcelona’s Sagrada Família Nears Completion—and Inflames a Tourism Backlash
entry.content: Pope Leo’s visit this week will mark a milestone for an architectural wonder whose wild popularity grates on some locals.

entry.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
entry.content: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

entry.title: Read the transcript: President Donald Trump interviewed by NBC News’ ‘Meet the Press’ moderator Kristen Welker
entry.content: Trump spoke about the war with Iran, the “anti-weaponization” fund, the economy, recent elections in California and more in June 2026 interview.

entry.title: Full interview: Trump says Iran ‘is not an endless war’ as conflict reaches 100 days
entry.content: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, President Trump talks about the economy, the ongoing war with Iran and the possible path to peace.

entry.title: 'Scary Movie' laughs its way to a first-place finish at the box office
entry.content: The Wayans brothers' horror spoof "Scary Movie" outmuscled "Masters of the Universe" at the box office this weekend.

entry.title: Tigers' Justin Verlander to make second Triple-A rehab start Wednesday
entry.content: Tigers pitcher Justin Verlander doesn’t love it, but he understands it.

entry.title: Antonelli wins Monaco from Hamilton after dramatic ending
entry.content: Kimi Antonelli wins the Monaco Grand Prix from Lewis Hamilton after a chaotic ending that featured two safety cars and a red flag.

entry.title: Orioles @ Jays Game Thread
entry.content: Game #66. Davis Schneider has walked 22 times in 52 PA in Buffalo. Generally, I’d think that was a good thing. But he’s hitting .185. I really think he needs to swing more. I don’t think MLB pitchers will walk a guy 43% of the time. On the flip side, Triple A pitches should be […]

entry.title: Blue Jays' Kevin Gausman spent the night before his start with Luke Combs and some beer
entry.content: This is one way to prepare for a start.

entry.title: Rio Ngumoha becomes England’s fifth-youngest debutant
entry.content: Liverpool youngster Rio Ngumoha has written his name into the England record books after becoming the fifth-youngest player ever to represent the senior national team.The 17-year-old winger made his f...

entry.title: Game #66: Pittsburgh Pirates vs. Atlanta Braves
entry.content: The Pirates are on the road looking to grab a win today.

entry.title: Caitlin Clark names exactly what she wants to 'absorb' from Knicks vs. Spurs NBA
entry.content: Caitlin Clark is studying late-game execution and team systems during the 2026 Knicks-Spurs NBA Finals to improve her own game.

entry.title: F1 2026 schedule: Full race calendar, round dates for Formula One season
entry.content: The 2026 F1 season began in Australia and runs until December. The Sporting News has the key dates, schedule and full calendar for this year.

entry.title: Michael van Gerwen becomes first to claim multiple PDC Nordic Darts Masters crowns
entry.content: The Dutch luminary delivered a succession of increasingly authoritative performances ...to secure his second World Series of Darts title of the 2026 campaign. In doing so, Van Gerwen became the first player to ...

entry.title: Sixers target NCAA Champion in recent mock draft
entry.content: It appears that the Sixers could be adding some championship winning expereince to their core, according to a recent mock draft.

entry.title: F1 standings 2026: Driver and constructor points, results for Formula One season
entry.content: A raft of new regulations promise to make the 2026 Formula One one of the most open and competitive for many years.

entry.title: OHSAA track & field state championship live results, updates, schedule in all 5 divisions in Ohio

entry.title: Who won F1 Monaco Grand Prix today? Updated Formula 1 results, standings after 2026 Monte Carlo race
entry.content: Kimi Antonelli was looking to tighten his grip at the top of the drivers' championship when the Formula One season arrived in Monte Carlo for the Monaco Grand Prix.

entry.title: The films of Steven Spielberg
entry.content: A look at the career of one of Hollywood's most celebrated filmmakers

entry.title: "Disclosure Day" director Steven Spielberg on alien visitations
entry.content: As a child, Steven Spielberg stared at a meteor shower and began his love affair with the sky. The director of the 1977 classic "Close Encounters of the Third Kind" returns with "Disclosure Day," which imagines closely-held secrets surrounding alien visitations.

entry.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (June 7)
entry.content: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

entry.title: An exhibit fit for a queen: The fashion of Elizabeth II
entry.content: During her lifetime, and her 70-year reign as Britain's monarch, Queen Elizabeth II's wardrobe was as important diplomatically as any speech she gave. A new exhibition on view at Buckingham Palace in London, "Queen Elizabeth II: Her Life in Style," is the most comprehensive look at her wardrobe, covering every decade of her life. Correspondent Alina Cho pays a visit, and also talks with fashion designer Erdem Moralioglu about how the Queen inspired his work.

entry.title: Aleksandar Stankovic: Man United target’s feelings on Old Trafford revealed
entry.content: Manchester United are preparing for one of the biggest transfer windows in the club’s recent history this summer, with sporting director Jason Wilcox armed with a potentially record-breaking budget....

entry.title: ‘It’s disgusting, how they treat fighters’: Eddie Hearn rips Zuffa Boxing, UFC’s treatment of Tom Aspinall
entry.content: Eddie Hearn says Zuffa Boxing “don’t get it” and that the company’s treatment of fighters is “disgusting”

entry.title: Bloom-Carroll leaves no doubt in winning the Division III state championship
entry.content: Emma Brandt led the Bloom-Carroll softball team to a win over Louisville to secure their fourth state softball championship.

entry.title: Soccer-Iran's World Cup team arrive in Tijuana with US tensions high
entry.content: By Emily Green TIJUANA, June 7 (Reuters) - Iran’s national soccer team arrived in Tijuana early on Sunday ahead of three World Cup matches in the United States, amid tensions that have turned the

entry.title: MLB insider pours cold water on White Sox trade deadline hype
entry.content: This is not a very exciting deadline update for the White Sox.

entry.title: Moloney takes IBF title from Garcia, Yabuki retains, Casimero destroys Nery
entry.content: Andrew Moloney finally won his first world title on Saturday in Japan, beating Willibaldo Garcia by majority decision to take the IBF super flyweight title. Moloney won the fight 115-113 on two score cards, with the third even at 114-114. The 35-year-old Moloney took short money to chase the title fight, reportedly $47,000, with Matchroom’s […]

entry.title: Eugenio Suárez says WBC didn't play role in his prolonged slump
entry.content: Reds slugger Eugenio Suárez and manager Terry Francona disagree on whether the World Baseball Classic contributed to Suárez's struggles this season.

entry.title: Extended interview: Steven Spielberg
entry.content: In this web exclusive, director Steven Spielberg talks with Turner Classic Movies host Ben Mankiewicz about his latest film, "Disclosure Day," and the science fiction influences on his work. He also discusses his beliefs about alien civilizations, given his depictions of extra-terrestrial life in some of his most popular movies.

entry.title: Stock Funds Are Up 11.5% This Year Thanks to Tech Rally
entry.content: May’s tech-fueled rally adds to a turnaround for investors. Plus: A Financial Flashback, the 10th anniversary of Brexit.

entry.title: How to Get Crypto Exposure Without Owning Crypto Directly
entry.content: Spot or index ETFs are good ways for ordinary investors to add cryptocurrencies to their portfolios, and there are higher-end options for the wealthy.

entry.title: Steven Spielberg on "Disclosure Day" and alien visitations
entry.content: As a child, Steven Spielberg stared at a meteor shower on a wondrous starry night and began his love affair with the sky. The director of the classic "Close Encounters of the Third Kind" and "E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial" has returned to the sci-fi genre with "Disclosure Day," which imagines closely-held secrets surrounding alien visitations. He talks with Turner Classic Movies host Ben Mankiewicz about UAP/UFO phenomena, the paranormal, and his own beliefs regarding intelligent life beyond Earth.

entry.title: The promises and pitfalls of GLP-1 drugs
entry.content: Approved 20 years ago as a diabetes treatment, GLP-1 drugs have been found to help patients reduce weight, changing the lives of more than 30 million people in the U.S. But there also have been troubling side effects reported.

entry.title: Passage: In memoriam
entry.content: "Sunday Morning" remembers some of the notable figures who left us this week, including soul singer Peabo Bryson.

entry.title: British deputy prime minister tells JD Vance he was wrong to blame immigration for teen's murder
entry.content: British deputy prime minister tells JD Vance he was wrong to blame immigration for teen's murder

entry.title: Texas has detected a flesh-eating parasite in livestock after 60 years
entry.content: Texas officials announced they have detected the New World screwworm in livestock, the first evidence of the parasite in that state in decades.

entry.title: It's one of the world's most isolated islands. Here come the bulldozers
entry.content: The Indian government is spending $9 billion to create a megaport, airport and city on this remote island. Critics fear the impact on pristine forests and the lives of indigenous inhabitants.

entry.title: We moved our family from the US to Italy for citizenship, then Italy changed the rules. We're not sure where to go next.
entry.content: We moved our family from the US to Italy for citizenship, then Italy changed the rules. We're not sure where to go next.

entry.title: Ukrainian mothers' fight to free children from Russians depicted in new opera
entry.content: Ukrainian mothers' fight to free children from Russians depicted in new opera

entry.title: When U.S. foreign aid changed, AIDS workers in Africa felt it
entry.content: In South Africa and Mozambique, health care providers say cancellation or redirection of U.S. PEPFAR funding under the Trump administration have already endangered vulnerable people and cost lives.

entry.title: Pope Leo tells 1.2 million crowd in Madrid that God stands with the poor
entry.content: Pope Leo tells 1.2 million crowd in Madrid that God stands with the poor

entry.title: Domincan Summer League preview
entry.content: Padres international players get the season started

entry.title: Marner's hat trick, Knights hold off Canes in 2OT, for series lead
entry.content: Shea Theodore scored at 5:38 of the second overtime and Mitch Marner recorded the fastest hat trick in Stanley Cup history.

entry.title: Oregon's Will Sanford pitching his best heading into super regional
entry.content: Oregon pitcher Will Sanford has come on strong late in the season. Can he deliver another standout performance vs. Texas with the season on the line?

entry.title: Where to watch Diamond League Stockholm: Full schedule, times, channels, live streams for 2026 track and field meet
entry.content: Here's everything you need to know about Diamond League Stockholm, including TV channel and streaming options for the professional track and field meet.

entry.title: Lothar Matthäus says Lennart Karl’s setback can make him stronger
entry.content: There are countless songs and sayings that use resilience as a primary theme for the old adage of “what doesn’t kill you, makes you stronger.” For Lothar Matthäus, that is extremely pertinent to Bayern Munich phenom Lennart Karl, whose World Cup dream was cut short by a torn muscle fiber. “It shocked me and I […]

entry.title: Carolina’s Historic Game 3 Rally Falls Short in Double Overtime
entry.content: “In this town, your luck can change just that quickly.“ I was inside the Lenovo Center after that abysmal second period of Thursday night. How could we feel any worse after that period? Then here comes the second period of Game 3. Time to flush it. Reset. What can the Carolina Hurricanes do to prepare […]

entry.title: 'Very happy for Shreyas Iyer': Suryakumar Yadav reacts after losing India captaincy
entry.content: Suryakumar Yadav has graciously congratulated Shreyas Iyer on his appointment as India's new T20I captain for the upcoming Ireland and England series. Despite being replaced as captain and dropped from the squad after leading India to a T20 World Cup victory, Suryakumar expressed pride in his Mumbai teammate's achievement, highlighting the strong representation from Mumbai cricket.

entry.title: UFC Fight Night Bonfim-Muhammad Results And Bonus Winners
entry.content: Gabriel Bonfim dominated Belal Muhammad 50-45 at UFC Fight Night in Las Vegas. Here are the full main card and prelim results, plus the bonus winners from the Apex.

entry.title: Peru’s discontented voters face straight left-right choice in election runoff
entry.content: Keiko Fujimori, the daughter of 1990s leader Alberto, is vying with a congressman to become country’s ninth president in a decadePeruvians go to the polls on Sunday in an election runoff that pits a perennial rightwing candidate, Keiko Fujimori, against a leftist congressman, Roberto Sánchez. Amid rising crime, chronic political instability, corruption scandals and voter apathy, they are vying to become Peru’s ninth president in a decade.Fujimori, who is the daughter of the late president Alberto Fujimori, won 17% of the vote in the first round in April. Sánchez, a former trade and tourism minister, took 12 % of the vote, edging out Rafael López Aliaga, an ultra-conservative former Lima mayor. The stage is set for a polarised left-right replay of the country’s last election in 2021. Continue reading...

entry.title: Simone Biles reveals she had a health scare and describes ‘almost dying’
entry.content: United States gymnastics great Simone Biles shared limited news of a health scare on Saturday, an experience she said included “almost dying.”The world’s most-decorated gymnast said on Instagram Stories that she had endured an unexpected situation, and she thanked well-wishers.“I’m not one to normally share things like this because I value privacy in today’s age,” Biles, 29, said on the social media platform.

entry.title: At least 12 shot near Ohio festival, gunmen still at large
entry.content: At least 12 people were shot Saturday when gunmen, possibly aiming for each other, opened fire near the Old West End Festival in Toledo, Ohio, police said.

entry.title: Multiple people have been shot near a festival in Toledo, Ohio, authorities say
entry.content: Multiple people were shot Saturday near a community festival in Toledo, Ohio, and police said a search for the suspects was ongoing following an outbreak of gunfire that sent people scrambling for cover.

entry.title: Cowboys trade idea sees Dallas cut ties with $136 million five-time Pro Bowl WR
entry.content: An ESPN analyst believes the Dallas Cowboys will make a significant wide receiver move next offseason.

entry.title: College baseball on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams for Saturday NCAA super regional games
entry.content: It's time to determine the eight teams that will head to Omaha for the 2026 College World Series. Here's when and where to watch all the super regional games today.

entry.title: NCAA baseball super regionals bracket, schedule, channels, live streams, scores for 2026 college tournament games
entry.content: The last stop on the road to Omaha is the super regionals. Here's when and where to watch every game.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
Do not mistake temptation for opportunity.
Lucky Numbers: 92, 99, 62, 46, 25, 66
